_comment: kinoheld IDs discovered 2026-07-07 via the cinemas(search:) GraphQL query (API capture in scraper/debug/woki_curl.txt); every ID verified against programByMovie. 'website' is the cinema's own site — showtime links point there instead of kinoheld; non-kinoheld ticket deeplinks (CineStar, kinotickets.express, chain shops) are kept. 'wheelchair' is yes/partial/no, researched 2026-07-07 mainly via the Barrierefrei field on kino-zeit.de plus the cinemas' own accessibility pages (see _wheelchair_note). Cinemas with 'source': 'custom' have their scraper in sources/custom.py.

cinemas.name: Woki
cinemas._wheelchair_note: kino-zeit.de: teilweise rollstuhlgerechter Zugang, kein rollstuhlgerechtes WC

cinemas.name: Kinopolis Bad Godesberg
cinemas._wheelchair_note: kinopolis.de/bn/saele: die meisten Säle 1 Rollstuhlplatz / begrenzt, ein Saal nicht zugänglich
cinemas._note: listed as 'Kinopolis Bonn' on kinoheld, Moltkestr. 7 = Bad Godesberg; their data carries no OV/OmU flags, so everything classifies as DE

cinemas.name: Bonner Kinemathek
cinemas._note: listed as 'Bonner Kinemathek - Kino in der Brotfabrik' on kinoheld

cinemas.name: Stern Lichtspiele
cinemas._note: = CineStar Bonn (Markt 8), listed as 'CineStar Bonn' on kinoheld; keeps its webticketing3.cinestar.de deeplinks

cinemas.name: Metropolis
cinemas._note: mostly-OV house. Not usably on kinoheld (id 974 there is an event venue) — scraped from their CineWeb site, tickets via kinotickets.express

cinemas.name: Filmpalette
cinemas._wheelchair_note: eigene Website: Säle ebenerdig erreichbar, WC-Anlagen im Keller; kino-zeit.de: teilweise
cinemas._note: their https is broken (cert), http works

cinemas.name: Rex am Ring
cinemas._wheelchair_note: Web: 3 Säle barrierefrei; im Detail unbestätigt, konservativ als teilweise geführt

cinemas.name: Lichtspiele Kalk
cinemas._wheelchair_note: eigene Seite lichtspiele-kalk.de/barrierefrei: ebenerdig, stufenfreier Saal, Rollstuhlplätze, barrierefreie WCs

cinemas.name: Kölner Filmhaus
cinemas._wheelchair_note: filmhaus-koeln.de/barrierefreiheit: stufenfreier Zugang, 2 Rollstuhlplätze im Saal

cinemas.name: Cinedom
cinemas._note: IS on kinoheld after all — no custom scraper needed
